source.title: High-power and long-cycle lithium battery positive electrode material and preparation method thereof
source.assignee: Jingmen GEM New Material Co Ltd; GEM Wuxi Energy Materials Co Ltd

goal.name: High-power and long-cycle lithium battery positive electrode material (B2O3-coated LiNi0.8Co0.1Mn0.1O2)
goal.boundary: cradle-to-gate; CN110980817B with a black-box MOFs synthesis step and detailed downstream oxide and lithiation steps

processes.name_zh: MOFs 模板合成（黑箱微波步骤）
processes.technology: Sodium metaaluminate, terephthalic acid, sodium hydroxide, and water are mixed, stirred for 1 h at room temperature, microwave-heated at 120 C for 2 h, then precipitated, washed, and dried.
processes.comment: Black-box process. CN110980817B discloses the step sequence and conditions for S1 but does not provide defensible normalized material quantities, so all S1 exchanges are represented as item-based batch placeholders.

processes.name_en: NCM811 oxide precursor synthesis (MOFs-templated co-precipitation + calcination)
processes.name_zh: NCM811 氧化物前驱体合成（MOFs 模板共沉淀 + 高温煅烧）
processes.technology: NiSO4.6H2O + CoSO4.7H2O + MnSO4.H2O (total 2.0 mol/L) are co-precipitated with 4.0 mol/L NaOH and 0.2-0.4 mol/L NH3. A, B, and C streams are fed at controlled flow rates to maintain pH 11-12.8 at 40-80 C under N2 with CTAB emulsifier and MOFs template. The precipitate is washed, dried, and calcined at about 550 C to Ni0.8Co0.1Mn0.1O2.
processes.comment: Detailed step normalized from the published example-style ratios in CN110980817B.

inputs.formula_ref: estimate-utilities electricity calls for 40-80 C co-precipitation plus about 550 C calcination; summed kWh_per_kg = 2.2464.
inputs.source_ref: CN110980817B process conditions; estimator primary calculation. EIA check only: Ningxia Zhonghua utilities.csv reports 13.392 kWh/kg site average.

outputs.comment: Mother liquor retained as a waste/liquor output because sulfate salts are formed during NaOH co-precipitation; quantity is an engineering estimate from the example plan.

outputs.formula_ref: estimate-utilities water: m_wash = m_solid x wash_factor; coprecipitate wash_factor = 5; wastewater approximately equals wash water.
outputs.source_ref: Patent gives washing after precipitation but not wash-water dose; EIA is not used for this coprecipitate wash estimate.

processes.name_en: High-power long-cycle Li-battery cathode material (B2O3-coated LiNi0.8Co0.1Mn0.1O2)
processes.name_zh: 高功率长循环锂电池正极材料（氧化硼包覆 NCM811）
processes.scale: CN; pilot-scale sintering and dry-coating line
processes.technology: NCM oxide is mixed with LiOH.H2O at mass ratio 3.10:1.88, sintered at 800 C in pure O2 for 10-12 h, crushed, washed, dried, then dry-blended with H3BO3 and heat-treated at 270 C for 10 h to form a B2O3 coating.
processes.comment: Detailed downstream lithiation and boric-acid dry coating step from CN110980817B.

inputs.formula_ref: EIA auxiliary fallback for undisclosed industrial NCM/CAM O2 flow: industrial_O2 52,000 t/a / 10,000 t/a NCM = 5.2 kg/kg.
inputs.source_ref: Ningxia Zhonghua NCM EIA (2020), structured in data/EIA/baseline_UPR/csv/utilities.csv; auxiliary only.
inputs.source_quote: CN110980817B states sintering in pure O2 for 10-12 h but does not disclose O2 flow.

inputs.formula_ref: estimate-utilities water: post_sinter_rinse wash_factor = 3; wastewater approximately equals wash water.
inputs.source_ref: CN110980817B names washing after sintering but does not disclose water dose.

inputs.formula_ref: estimate-utilities electricity for 800 C pure-O2 sintering plus dry heat treatment; kWh_per_kg = 9.5749.
inputs.source_ref: CN110980817B process temperatures and durations; EIA check only: Ningxia Zhonghua site average electricity = 13.392 kWh/kg.

outputs.formula_ref: Mass balance paired with water input: wastewater = 3 kg/kg product, ignoring evaporation.
outputs.source_ref: CN110980817B washing step; water amount estimated by estimator.
